title: Tooltip Component

statement.markdown:
text: ## Tooltip Component

Create a tooltip component that appears when a user hovers over a button.

### Requirements

1. The tooltip should be positioned 10px from the top and right of the button.
2. The tooltip should be hidden when the user stops hovering over the button.
3. The tooltip should not overlap with other elements on the page.
4. The tooltip should be able to be styled with different colors and backgrounds.

constraints: Use JavaScript to create the tooltip component.
Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
The tooltip component should be able to be reused on the page.

starterCode.html:
index.html: {"text":"<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Tooltip Component</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css">
</head>
<body>
  <button class="relative">Hover over me</button>
  <script src="script.js"></script>
</body>
</html>"}

gradingCriteria.description: The tooltip appears when the user hovers over the button
The tooltip is hidden when the user stops hovering over the button
The tooltip is positioned 10px from the top and right of the button
The tooltip can be styled with different colors and backgrounds
